description: Generated bridge oracle smoke scenarios: one primary scenario per base-game joker plus rare combo and shop-event cases.

scenarios.note: Uses select_blind because this joker's visible effect is not primarily a single hand score.

Face-card retriggers stack with Red Seal, Hanging Chad, Sock and Buskin, Photograph, and Smiley Face.
Held-card xmult/mult stack with Mime retriggers, Baron, Shoot the Moon, Steel, and Red Seal.
Smeared Joker changes suit buckets for Seeing Double and Flower Pot style suit checks.
Four-card straight flush detection with rank gaps and Smeared black-suit flush behavior.

scenarios.joker_name: Copy joker plus Baseball rarity stack
scenarios.note: Blueprint/Brainstorm copy resolution with Baseball Card uncommon xmult and held-card Blackboard.
Gold seal, Golden Ticket, and Rough Gem scoring-time dollars should affect Bootstraps in the same hand.
Blueprint copying Bloodstone should add another forced X1.5 roll for every scoring Heart.
Flash Card scales when the shop is rerolled.
Campfire gains XMult when another card is sold.
Red Card gains Mult when an opened booster is skipped.
Hologram scales when a playing card is bought from the shop.
Hologram scales when a playing card is selected from a Standard Pack.
Constellation scales when a Planet card is used from a Celestial Pack.
Fortune Teller's tarot-use counter is exercised by using Hermit from an Arcana Pack.
Perkeo creates a negative consumable copy when leaving the shop.
Splash scores all cards while Pareidolia lets Midas gold them and Vampire strips enhancements afterward.
Red Seal, Hack, Dusk, and Seltzer all add scored-card repetitions on the same low-card straight.
Blueprint copying Mime should add another held-card retrigger on top of Red Seal and Baron.

scenarios.joker_name: Brainstorm copied Sock and Buskin retriggers
scenarios.note: Brainstorm copies the leftmost Sock and Buskin, stacking face-card retriggers with Photograph and Red Seal.

scenarios.joker_name: Negative joker buy at full slots
scenarios.note: Negative shop jokers can be bought even when all normal joker slots are full.

scenarios.joker_name: Negative Buffoon Pack pick at full slots
scenarios.note: Negative jokers from Buffoon Packs should also bypass the normal slot limit.
The Flint halves base hand chips and Mult using the live boss blind implementation.
The Psychic should score zero for a played hand with fewer than five cards.
The Hook discards two random held cards before scoring; replay-diff infers the actual cards discarded.
The Head debuffs Heart cards; suit jokers and card chips should not fire for debuffed scoring cards.
The Plant debuffs face cards, suppressing their chips, scored-card joker bonuses, and Photograph.
The Tooth removes $1 per played card before money-scaled joker scoring, which changes Bootstraps immediately.
The Water sets discards to zero as the blind starts, so Banner should score no discard chips.
The Needle reduces the blind to one hand; Acrobat should see that hand as the final hand.
The scenario raises the game's normal probability multiplier so every Bloodstone roll succeeds.
Space Joker should level the scored hand before score calculation when its probability is forced.
Lucky Card's Mult and money rolls are separate; forced probabilities exercise both plus Lucky Cat scaling.
Glass Card shatter removes the played card and increments Glass Joker when the probability is forced.
A forced Business Card payout should feed Bootstraps during the same scoring calculation.
Forced Reserved Parking held-face payouts should also feed Bootstraps on the same hand.
